whpb_20230711_press_gpt-5-2025-08-07.coherence_explanation: Ideas are logically grouped and ordered, moving from Sweden’s accession and U.S. engagement to summit priorities, Ukraine-related items, and specific press-driven topics. whpb_20230711_press_gpt-5-2025-08-07.tone_explanation: The summary maintains an objective, professional tone throughout, avoiding casual language and subjective judgments.
